Table of Contents

Class ComprobanteDTO

Namespace
BLL.DTOs
Assembly
BLL.dll

Transfer object representing a receipt (comprobante) file attached to a payment or reservation.

public class ComprobanteDTO
Inheritance
object
ComprobanteDTO
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Either PagoID or ReservaID must be set to identify the owning entity. Contenido holds the raw file bytes (typically an HTML receipt generated by ComprobanteGenerator). RutaArchivo is an optional filesystem path used when the file is persisted to disk rather than stored as a BLOB. Id is auto-assigned on construction.

Constructors

ComprobanteDTO() 

public ComprobanteDTO()

Properties

Contenido

Raw file bytes of the receipt document.

public byte[] Contenido { get; set; }

Property Value

byte[]

FechaSubida

Timestamp when the receipt was attached. Defaults to DateTime.Now when not set.

public DateTime FechaSubida { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

Id

Primary key, auto-assigned on construction.

public Guid Id { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

NombreArchivo

Display file name including extension (e.g., "Payment_Receipt_42.html").

public string NombreArchivo { get; set; }

Property Value

string

PagoID

FK to the associated payment, or null when linked to a reservation instead.

public Guid? PagoID { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid?

ReservaID

FK to the associated reservation, or null when linked to a payment instead.

public Guid? ReservaID { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid?

RutaArchivo

Optional filesystem path for disk-backed storage. null when content is stored as Contenido.

public string RutaArchivo { get; set; }

Property Value

string
